title: Risk Review Meeting — 2025-04-16
text:
# Risk Review Meeting — 2025-04-16

**Attendees:** Nina Schulz, Sam Dreher, Lena Okafor, Aisha Mbeki

## Summary

This page covers the battery chemistry evaluation for the Comms/Datalink subsystem. Key items discussed and actions agreed are recorded here.

## Actions

- Follow-up with Tyler Moss on outstanding items.
